name: Golett

forms.name: Copper
forms.pokedexDescription: Its been alive for thousands of years, recharging its power by standing in lightning storms. If it doesn't stay active enough, it will slowly oxidize over time. The more oxidization it has, the slower it moves.

evolutions.summary: Usar electirizer · (consume objeto sostenido) · variante copper

pokedexDescription: Ancient science fashioned this Pokémon from clay. It's been active for thousands of years.
